reference_groups.entry_label: The elevated parts of the earth
reference_groups.raw_segment: The elevated parts of the earth —  Ge 7:19,20.

reference_groups.entry_label: Sets the foundations of, on fire.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Sets the foundations of, on fire. — De 32:22.
Causes, to melt. — Jdj 5:5; Ps 97:5; Isa 64:1,3.

reference_groups.entry_label: Collect the vapours which ascend from the earth
reference_groups.raw_segment: Collect the vapours which ascend from the earth —  Ps 104:6,8.

reference_groups.entry_label: Are the sources of springs and rivers
reference_groups.raw_segment: Are the sources of springs and rivers —  De 8:7; Ps 104:8-10.
Volcanic fires of, alluded to —  Isa 64:1,2; Jer 51:25; Na 1:5,6.
Olives or mount of corruption. — 1Ki 11:7; 2Ki 23:13; Lu 21:37.
A defence to a country —  Ps 125:2.

reference_groups.entry_label: Afford refuge in time of danger
reference_groups.raw_segment: Afford refuge in time of danger —  Ge 14:10; Jdj 6:2; Mt 24:16; Heb 11:38.

reference_groups.entry_label: Sometimes selected as places for divine worship
reference_groups.raw_segment: Sometimes selected as places for divine worship —  Ge 22:2,5; Ex 3:12; Isa 2:2.

reference_groups.entry_label: Often selected as places for idolatrous worship
reference_groups.raw_segment: Often selected as places for idolatrous worship —  De 12:2; 2Ch 21:11.

reference_groups.entry_label: Beacons or ensigns often raised upon
reference_groups.raw_segment: Beacons or ensigns often raised upon —  Isa 13:2; 30:17.
Of persons in authority. — Ps 72:3; Isa 44:23.
Of the church of God. — Isa 2:2; Da 2:35,44,45.
Of proud and haughty persons. — Isa 2:14.

reference_groups.entry_label: (Breaking forth into singing,) of exceeding joy.
reference_groups.raw_segment: (Breaking forth into singing,) of exceeding joy. — Isa 44:23; 55:12.
